text: A person is feeding a small orange kitten.
A man with a laptop on his desk is sitting in front of a computer desk.
Sunshines through the window of a bedroom onto the bed, with folded clothing and a styrofoam wedge sitting on top of it, and an office chair beside it.
Two double-decker buses are parked in a lot.
A small girl is carrying a teddy bear
A white plate topped with a cheesy covered burrito.
A fire hydrant with an out of service sign and a dog in the background.
A couple of ladies stand on surfboards and paddle with oars on a slightly rippled body of water.
a cow that is walking through the town
A red fire hydrant posed on a street corner in grass.
